_comment: Furigana/ruby layout settings. Resource packs can override this file at assets/rubi/ruby_settings.json to tweak how ruby annotations are laid out. Values reload when resource packs change.
_fields: text_scale = base text scale inside ruby annotations (1.0 = no shift), ruby_scale = furigana scale relative to base, ruby_overlap = furigana overlap with base (positive = closer/overlaps, negative = gap above base), y_offset_furigana = extra vertical shift (pixels, positive = down) applied to lines that render at least one unknown ruby word inside FIXED-height containers (UI buttons, chat, creative tab title, …), y_offset_furigana_dynamic = same but for DYNAMIC-height containers (item tooltips, hover popups); falls back to y_offset_furigana when omitted, y_offset_plain = vertical shift applied to lines that render no furigana at all (no annotations, or all known) inside fixed-height containers, y_offset_plain_dynamic = same but for dynamic-height containers; falls back to y_offset_plain when omitted, line_height_bonus = integer pixels added only by local wrapped-text / tooltip / multiline layout hooks so those containers leave room for furigana above each line (positive = more space between lines). It does not mutate Font.lineHeight globally. Legacy key "y_offset" is still accepted and seeds y_offset_furigana for backward compatibility.
